name: Luis Cerezo
current: Sr. TAM at AWS, Enterprise Support, Financial Services Industry, US West, Feb 2024-present
years: 25+ years total in tech (since 1999). At AWS as an employee since 2021. Running production workloads ON AWS since ~2015 at PLXIS. Do not say '25 years of AWS' — AWS launched in 2006.
experience: AWS TAM (2021-present): Trusted Advisor to Fortune 500 financial services (payments, banking, insurance). Enterprise architecture, multi-region resilience, GenAI operations, contact center modernization. Well-Architected reviews, cost optimization, game days, workshops. Onboarding coach for new TAMs.

Sr. SRE at PLXIS/IPC (2015-2021): Credit/debit platform for Subway, 25K+ locations, $6B/yr volume, 5 9's uptime. Cut AWS spend 21%. Reduced false pages 99%. Terraform, Ansible, Splunk architecture. PCI/DSS.
Sr. Linux Engineer at Viasat (2012-2015): Satellite internet billing/provisioning. RHEL, Solaris, Oracle RAC, 24/7 zero-downtime. PCI/SOX.

Sr. Linux Engineer at PGS (2005-2012): Global infra for seismic processing. SSO across 8 datacenters/1500+ hosts extended to tens of thousands on HPC. cfengine, Nagios. 500 PhD users. International travel, hiring manager KL.
Server Admin at Schlumberger (1999-2005): Multi-platform admin for 600+ users. Consolidated 30 Windows servers to 15 Linux/Unix.
